src: A brown teddy bear with soft plush fur, left hand up, right hand on the leg. It has creamy round paws, a stitched smile, a blue ice pack on its head, and a patch on its chest reading "Get Well".
edit: A futuristic teddy bear with metallic exterior and neon accents. The left hand has LED lights, the right hand on a chrome leg. It features a changing-color luminous paws, LED display smile, high-tech visor, and chest display reading "Get Well" in cyberpunk style.

per_image_non_shared_src.00: The object is on a large textured rock outdoors, surrounded by green foliage and a paved pathway, with another big rock in the back on the left, captured from a right side angle.
per_image_non_shared_src.01: The object is on a smooth concrete surface beside a gently flowing river, with a grassy backdrop, viewed from a lower angle, highlighting the rippling water and scattered green leaves.
per_image_non_shared_src.02: The object sits on an asphalt road with worn markings, viewed from the front and slightly left. The road stretches behind with faint tire imprints and a slope to the right.
per_image_non_shared_src.03: The object rests on vibrant green park grass, rotated slightly to the left, surrounded by lush grass blades with no obstruction.
per_image_non_shared_src.04: The object is against a brick wall on a concrete sidewalk, viewed straight on at eye level. The wall emphasizes the texture of the bricks and the smoothness of the concrete. A dry leaf is noticeable to the side.

per_image_non_shared_edit.00: A sleek object on a neon-illuminated rock in a futuristic urban setting, slightly distant, surrounded by glowing foliage and an iridescent path. Another glowing boulder on the left background, captured from a right angle with vibrant neon lights and digital screens.
per_image_non_shared_edit.01: A futuristic object on a sleek metallic surface beside a neon-lit river with digital grass as a backdrop. Viewed from a lower angle, with holographic water ripples and glowing green digital leaves, in a cyberpunk landscape.
per_image_non_shared_edit.02: An advanced object with neon-lit accents sits on a glowing digital road with pulsating markings, seen from the front and slightly angled left. The path stretches behind with bioluminescent tire imprints, a slope to the right, and holographic signs, under a digital twilight sky.
per_image_non_shared_edit.03: An object rests on neon-infused metallic ground, in a cyberpunk digital landscape, surrounded by glowing digital grass blades. It is slightly rotated to the left, with vivid green hues. The scene has ambient neon lights and no obstructing skyscrapers or drones.
per_image_non_shared_edit.04: The object stands against a neon-illuminated brick wall and glowing concrete sidewalk, viewed directly at eye level. The wall has vibrant digital graffiti and holographic lights. A dry chrome-like leaf lies to the side, under the iridescent street glow.
